name: Jack Daniel's Rib Glaze
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup DARK BROWN SUGAR, firmly packed
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and stir well to ensure even distribution.
2. Brush the ribs with a thin coating of glaze, ensuring each rib is lightly coated.
3. Place the ribs on the grill.
4. Continue to baste the ribs with the glaze mixture when turning them for optimal flavor.
